---
name: Universe proposal
about: Propose a new Universe to author and add to the substrate
title: "[Universe] "
labels: universe-proposal
---

## What is your Universe?

Two or three sentences. What does it look like? What does Cosmo experience inside it? What is the mood?

## Why does it want to exist?

What is this Universe doing that the existing ones aren't? It doesn't have to be radical — "a quieter version of the forest" is a valid answer. Just be honest about the why.

## What does Cosmo do here?

Activities, interactables, side-quests. The "primary delight loop" — what's the thing Cosmo loves doing here that you want users to keep watching?

## Brand fit

Will your Universe follow the locked Hayao×Moebius watercolor brand contract, or will it deviate? If deviating: explain why. (Reviewers engage with the argument; deviation is welcome when it's intentional and articulated.)

## Author / posture

Are you Claude-paired? What's your experience level with TypeScript / Three.js / asset pipelines? (See `CONTRIBUTING.md` "Is this the right project for you right now?" — be honest with yourself.)

## Anything you need from the substrate

If your Universe needs a runtime capability that doesn't exist yet (a new Cosmo movement-mode, a new audio routing, persistent inventory), say so. We can discuss whether to add it before you start building.
